Package i5.cb.telos.object

Class ObjectBaseInterface

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.object.ObjectBaseInterface
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITelosObjectSet

    public class ObjectBaseInterface
extends java.lang.Object
implements ITelosObjectSet
    This implementation of ITelosObjectSet uses a direct connection to a CBserver to retrieve all information which is necessary to answer the questions. Query results may be cached, but the caches are not maintained.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected boolean bRefreshCache  
      protected boolean bUseCache  
      protected ICBclient cb

      Constructor Description

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void add​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
      Transform the objects to Telos frames and tell them to the server.
      void add​(TelosObject to)
      Adding a single object does not make sense, use add(ITelosObjectSet) instead
      boolean add​(java.util.List objects)
      Transform the objects to Telos frames and tell them to the server.
      java.lang.String ask​(java.lang.String sQuery, java.lang.String sAnswerRep)
      Send the query to server.
      ITelosObjectSet askFrame​(java.lang.String sQuery)
      Send the query to server, the answer is returned as a set of frames which are transformed into a set of telos objects.
      ITelosObjectSet askFrame​(java.lang.String sQuery, boolean firstFrameOnly)
      Like askFrame(sQuery) but if firstFrameOnly is true, then only the TelosObjects in the first frame will be included in the result.
      ITelosObjectSet askObjname​(java.lang.String sQuery)
      Send the query to the server, the answer is returned as a set of object names which are transformed into a set of telos objects.
      java.lang.String asPropositions​()
      Not useful for this implementation.
      void clear​()
      This method is not allowed in ConceptBase.
      java.lang.Object clone​()
      Cloning creates a new ObjectBaseInterface with a new connection to the same CBserver.
      boolean contains​(TelosObject object)
      Calls exists[object/objname]
      java.util.Enumeration elements​()
      Not useful for this implementation.
      void emptyCache​()
      Empty cache.

      ITelosObjectSet getAllSubclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
      This function returns the transitive closure of (x isA o).
      ITelosObjectSet getAllSuperclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
      This function returns the transitive closure of (o isA x).

      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOf​(TelosObject o)  
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfCategory​(TelosObject o, Attribute attrCategory)  
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o, Attribute attrCategory)
      This is a special case which is often needed (e.g in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory.

      ICBclient getCBClient​()
      returns the CBClient of this Interface

      Gets the Individuals the telosObject to refers to via attribute links

      • setUseCache

      • emptyCache

        public void emptyCache​()
        Empty cache. All cached answers are removed from the cache.

      • ask

        public java.lang.String ask​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                            java.lang.String sAnswerRep)
        Send the query to server.
        Returns:
        the answer as string with the specified answer representation, "null" on error.

      • askFrame

        public ITelosObjectSet askFrame​(java.lang.String sQuery)
        Send the query to server, the answer is returned as a set of frames which are transformed into a set of telos objects.
        Returns:
        the set of telos objects that represents the telos frames, null on error

      • askFrame

        public ITelosObjectSet askFrame​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                                boolean firstFrameOnly)
        Like askFrame(sQuery) but if firstFrameOnly is true, then only the TelosObjects in the first frame will be included in the result.

      • askObjname

        public ITelosObjectSet askObjname​(java.lang.String sQuery)
        Send the query to the server, the answer is returned as a set of object names which are transformed into a set of telos objects.
        Returns:
        the set of telos objects that represents the object names, null on error.

      • removeUnknownAttributeDestinations

        protected void removeUnknownAttributeDestinations​(ITelosObjectSet tos)

      • clone

        public java.lang.Object clone​()
        Cloning creates a new ObjectBaseInterface with a new connection to the same CBserver. The cloned object does not have anything in its caches.
        Specified by:
        clone in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Overrides:
        clone in class java.lang.Object

        public boolean contains​(TelosObject object)
        Calls exists[object/objname]

        Returns:

      • size

        public int size​()
        Calls COUNT[Proposition/class]
        Specified by:
        size in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the size of this set, that is the number of Telos objects this currently contains

      • isEmpty

        Always false for this implementation.

      • getTheOnlyMember

        public TelosObject getTheOnlyMember​()
                             throws java.lang.Exception
        This set has more than one member, so the method throws always an exception.
        Specified by:
        getTheOnlyMember in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        null, if this is empty. o, if o is the only member of this.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if size() greater-than 1

      • add

        public void add​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
        Transform the objects to Telos frames and tell them to the server.
        Specified by:
        add in interface ITelosObjectSet

      • add

        public boolean add​(java.util.List objects)
            throws java.lang.Exception
        Transform the objects to Telos frames and tell them to the server. This version of add should be preferred as it guarantees to preserve the order of elements.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

      • remove

        public void remove​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
        Transform the objects to Telos frames and delete them in the server.
        Specified by:
        remove in interface ITelosObjectSet

      • remove

        public boolean remove​(java.util.List objects)
               throws java.lang.Exception
        Transform the objects to Telos frames and delete them in the server. This version of add should be preferred as it guarantees to preserve the order of elements.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

        public void remove​(TelosObject to)
        Removing a single object does not make sense, use remove(ITelosObjectSet) instead

      • getIndividual

        public Individual getIndividual​(java.lang.String sLabel)
        Specified by:
        getIndividual in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individual with the given label, if present, null otherwise

      • getLinks

        public ITelosObjectSet getLinks​(TelosObject src,
                                TelosObject dst,
                                TelosObject cat)
        Returns:
        the links between src and dst which are instances of cat.

      • getLinks

        public ITelosObjectSet getLinks​(TelosObject src,
                                TelosObject dst)
        Returns:
        all explicit links between src and dst

      • getInstantiation

        public Instantiation getInstantiation​(TelosObject source,
                                      TelosObject destination)
        Specified by:
        getInstantiation in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the instantiation object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained instantiation objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'in' closure) are returned.

      • getSpecialization

        public Specialization getSpecialization​(TelosObject source,
                                        TelosObject destination)
        Specified by:
        getSpecialization in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the specialization object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained specialization objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'isA' closure) are returned.

      • getAttribute

        public Attribute getAttribute​(TelosObject source,
                              java.lang.String sLabel)
        Specified by:
        getAttribute in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute object with the given source and label

                             TelosObject destination)
        Specified by:
        getObject in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the object with the given source, label and destination, if present, null otherwise

        Returns:
        the instantiation (classification) links that come out of o

        Specified by:

        Specified by:
        getGeneralizationsFrom in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:

                                                         Attribute cat)

      • getAttributesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getAttributesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o (includes implicit attributes)

      • getExplicitAttributesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitAttributesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        only the explicit attribute links that come out of o

      • getExplicitAttributeValuesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitAttributeValuesOf​(TelosObject to)
        Gets the Individuals the telosObject to refers to via attribute links

      • getAttributesTo

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesTo​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getAttributesTo in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that go into o (only explicit attributes)

      • getSourcesOfAttributesTo

        public ITelosObjectSet getSourcesOfAttributesTo​(TelosObject to)
        Gets the Individuals which refer to the telosObject to via attribute links

      • getAttributesOfCategory

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                               Attribute attrCategory)
        Specified by:
        getAttributesOfCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are instance of the given category. In this implementation, explicit attributes and implicit attributes (deduced by rules) are returned.

      • getAttributesOfExplicitCategory

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                                       Attribute attrCategory)
        Description copied from interface: ITelosObjectSet
        This is a special case which is often needed (e.g in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory.
        Specified by:
        getAttributesOfExplicitCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are instance of the given category. In this implementation, only explicit attributes and no implicit attributes (deduced by rules) are returned.

      • getSingleAttributeOfCategory

        public Attribute getSingleAttributeOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                              Attribute attrCategory)
                                       throws java.lang.Exception
        Specified by:
        getSingleAttributeOfCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the single attribute of the given category that comes out of o, if any. null, if none.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if there is more than one attribute of o with the given category.
        See Also:
        getAttributesOfCategory(i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject, i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute)

      • getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory

        public Attribute getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                                      Attribute attrCategory)
                                               throws java.lang.Exception
        Description copied from interface: ITelosObjectSet
        This is a special case which is often needed (e.g. in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory; There is no error handling, if there is more than one category.
        Specified by:
        getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute of the given category that comes out of o, if any. null, if none.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if there is more than one attribute of o with the given category.
        See Also:
        getAttributesOfExplicitCategory(i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject, i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute)

      • getOutgoingLinksOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getOutgoingLinksOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getOutgoingLinksOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the links that come out of o

        public ITelosObjectSet getIncomingLinksOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getIncomingLinksOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the links that go into o

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitClassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getExplicitClassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared classes of o

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitInstancesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getExplicitInstancesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared instances of o

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSuperclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getExplicitSuperclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared superclasses of o

      • getExplicitSubclassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSubclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getExplicitSubclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are direct (or explicit) subclasses of o

      • getAllSuperclassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllSuperclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        This function returns the transitive closure of (o isA x).
        Returns:
        the individuals that are superclasses of o, even those which are indirect (or implicit) superclasses.

      • getAllSubclassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllSubclassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        This function returns the transitive closure of (x isA o).
        Specified by:
        getAllSubclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are subclasses of o, even those which are indirect (or implicit) subclasses.

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllInstancesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Specified by:
        getAllInstancesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in o)

      • getAllClassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllClassesOf​(TelosObject o)
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in o)

      • isExplicitClassOf

        public boolean isExplicitClassOf​(TelosObject o1,
                                 TelosObject o2)
        o1 is an explicit class of o2, i.e. In_e(o2,o1) is true.
        Specified by:
        isExplicitClassOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in o)

        isExplicitSuperclassOf in interface ITelosObjectSet

        public boolean isExplicitSubclassOf​(TelosObject o1,
                                    TelosObject o2)
        o1 is an explicit sub class of o2, i.e. Isa_e(o1,o2) is true.
        Specified by:
        isExplicitSubclassOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
